entities.name: BOSOMTWE RANGE FOREST RESERVE
entities.description: A forest reserve in Ghana used as the study area for vegetation dynamics assessment

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the Bosomtwe Range Forest Reserve is located

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A technique used to assess vegetation dynamics and land cover changes

entities.name: QUANTUM GIS
entities.description: A geographic information system software used for land use land cover change detection

entities.name: SUPERVISED CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A method applied to detect land use land cover changes

entities.name: MAXIMUM-LIKELIHOOD ALGORITHM
entities.description: An algorithm used within supervised classification for land cover detection

entities.name: LAND USE LAND COVER CHANGE DETECTION
entities.description: The analysis of changes in land use and land cover over time

entities.name: FOREST FRAGMENTATION
entities.description: The process of breaking large forests into smaller, isolated patches

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOREST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing forests to maintain biodiversity and productivity

entities.name: LANDSAT 4 – TM
entities.description: Satellite imagery used for land cover analysis in 1991

entities.name: LANDSAT 7 – ETM
entities.description: Satellite imagery used for land cover analysis in 2002

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: Satellite imagery used for land cover analysis in 2017

entities.name: FOREST COVER
entities.description: The area of land covered by forest canopy, including closed and opened types

entities.name: FOREST DEPLETION
entities.description: The reduction of forest area, specifically identified in north eastern and western portions of the reserve

entities.name: REFORESTATION
entities.description: The process of planting trees in degraded areas to improve forest cover

entities.name: BUILT-UP AREAS
entities.description: Land cover consisting of human-made structures
